calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-090 R-c commit-readiness gate validation (commitment_closure:GAP-4 substrate)
items.note: Falsifier-grade 2-arm diagnostic for the MECH-090 R-c commit-entry readiness conjunction substrate landed 2026-05-28 (commitment_closure_plan.md GAP-4; ree-v3/ree_core/heartbeat/beta_gate.py + ree-v3/ree_core/agent.py + ree-v3/ree_core/utils/config.py). ARM_0 GATED: V3-EXQ-592 EMERGENT-arm curriculum with use_commit_readiness_gate=True + floor=0.05. Acceptance: at least 1 seed in 3 shows mech090_n_elevation_blocked >= 1 AND total_committed_steps == 0 AND running_variance < commitment_threshold (confirming gate is the load-bearing block on the degenerate basin). ARM_1 GATED_FORCED_READY: clone trained agent + force rv=0.001 + gate ON. Acceptance: at least 2 seeds in 3 show mech090_n_elevation_admitted >= 1 AND total_committed_steps > 0 (confirming gate does not permanently lock out commitment when readiness clears). Joint PASS unblocks commitment_closure:GAP-4 (partial -> done substrate-side) and queues Phase 4/5 *b cohort (460b/461/463b/464b/466b/467b/468b). Joint FAIL routes per the experiment-script docstring interpretation grid. Predecessor synthesis: REE_assembly/evidence/literature/targeted_review_connectome_mech_090/synthesis.md commit 9e68c5ca8a. Predecessor session: implement-substrate-mech090-commit-predicate-20260528T172800Z. Smoke verified 2026-05-29 dry-run --seeds 42: wiring intact, gate ON propagates, diagnostics populated, margins computed (ARM_0 margin=0.7977 ARM_1 margin=0.1285 on short budget -- degenerate basin not reproduced at dry-run scale, full 400-ep P0 budget required).
